title: bidens nematocera
intro: Bidens nematocera, also known as the annual beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens nematocera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive problems, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine.
